title: [InstCombine][profcheck] Propogate profile metadata when transforming br (X && !Y) to br (!X || Y)
test_patch:
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/branch.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/branch.ll
index 1d5ff72eef9ce..09bba16e9e6c7 100644
--- a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/branch.ll
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/branch.ll
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-; NOTE: Assertions have been autogenerated by utils/update_test_checks.py
+; NOTE: Assertions have been autogenerated by utils/update_test_checks.py UTC_ARGS: --check-globals smart
 ; RUN: opt -passes=instcombine -S < %s | FileCheck %s
 
 declare void @use(i1)
@@ -121,8 +121,8 @@ define i32 @logical_and_not(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @logical_and_not(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT_X:%.*]] = xor i1 [[X:%.*]], true
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = select i1 [[NOT_X]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]]
-; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[TMP0]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = select i1 [[NOT_X]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]], !prof [[PROF0:![0-9]+]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[TMP0]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]], !prof [[PROF0]]
 ; CHECK:       t:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 42
 ; CHECK:       f:
@@ -130,8 +130,8 @@ define i32 @logical_and_not(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
 ;
 entry:
   %noty = xor i1 %y, true
-  %and = select i1 %x, i1 %noty, i1 false
-  br i1 %and, label %t, label %f
+  %and = select i1 %x, i1 %noty, i1 false, !prof !0
+  br i1 %and, label %t, label %f, !prof !0
 
 t:
   ret i32 42
@@ -140,22 +140,24 @@ f:
   ret i32 3
 }
 
+!0 = !{!"branch_weights", i32 10, i32 20}
+
 ; if (x && y || !x) ret 3; ret 42 --> if (!x || y) ret 3; ret 42
 
 define i32 @logical_and_or(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @logical_and_or(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT_X:%.*]] = xor i1 [[X:%.*]], true
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = select i1 [[NOT_X]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]]
-; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[AND]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = select i1 [[NOT_X]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]], !prof [[PROF0]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[AND]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]], !prof [[PROF1:![0-9]+]]
 ; CHECK:       t:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 42
 ; CHECK:       f:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 3
 ;
 entry:
-  %and = select i1 %x, i1 %y, i1 true
-  br i1 %and, label %f, label %t
+  %and = select i1 %x, i1 %y, i1 true, !prof !0
+  br i1 %and, label %f, label %t, !prof !0
 
 t:
   ret i32 42
@@ -170,8 +172,8 @@ define i32 @logical_or_not(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @logical_or_not(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOTX:%.*]] = xor i1 [[X:%.*]], true
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = select i1 [[NOTX]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]]
-; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[AND]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = select i1 [[NOTX]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]], !prof [[PROF1]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[AND]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]], !prof [[PROF1]]
 ; CHECK:       t:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 42
 ; CHECK:       f:
@@ -179,8 +181,8 @@ define i32 @logical_or_not(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
 ;
 entry:
   %notx = xor i1 %x, true
-  %and = select i1 %notx, i1 true, i1 %y
-  br i1 %and, label %f, label %t
+  %and = select i1 %notx, i1 true, i1 %y, !prof !0
+  br i1 %and, label %f, label %t, !prof !0
 
 t:
   ret i32 42
@@ -338,3 +340,9 @@ if.else:
   %zext = zext i1 %cmp to i32
   ret i32 %zext
 }
+
+
+;.
+; CHECK: [[PROF0]] = !{!"branch_weights", i32 20, i32 10}
+; CHECK: [[PROF1]] = !{!"branch_weights", i32 10, i32 20}
+;.

tests.test_body:
define i32 @logical_and_not(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @logical_and_not(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT_X:%.*]] = xor i1 [[X:%.*]], true
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = select i1 [[NOT_X]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]], !prof [[PROF0:![0-9]+]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[TMP0]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]], !prof [[PROF0]]
; CHECK:       t:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 42
; CHECK:       f:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 3
entry:
  %noty = xor i1 %y, true
  %and = select i1 %x, i1 %noty, i1 false, !prof !0
  br i1 %and, label %t, label %f, !prof !0

t:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 42

f:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 3
}
tests.source_program:
define i32 @logical_and_not(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
entry:
  %noty = xor i1 %y, true
  %and = select i1 %x, i1 %noty, i1 false, !prof !0
  br i1 %and, label %t, label %f, !prof !0

t:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 42

f:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 3
}

; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[AND]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]], !prof [[PROF1:![0-9]+]]

; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 42
; CHECK:       f:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 3
entry:

  br i1 %and, label %f, label %t, !prof !0

t:                                                ; preds = %entry

f:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 3
}

  br i1 %and, label %f, label %t, !prof !0

; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[AND]], label [[F:%.*]], label [[T:%.*]], !prof [[PROF1]]
; CHECK:       t:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 42
; CHECK:       f:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 3
entry:
  %notx = xor i1 %x, true
  %and = select i1 %notx, i1 true, i1 %y, !prof !0
  br i1 %and, label %f, label %t, !prof !0

t:                                                ; preds = %entry
